steps: "File IB 92 Universeel form with Dutch Belastingdienst claiming NL-NO treaty rate of 15% on Unilever NV dividends",
"Submit supporting documentation: Norwegian tax residency certificate and ABN AMRO custody statement showing 25% withholding",
"Request refund of EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding (difference between 25% applied and 15% treaty rate)",
"Follow up with ABN AMRO Custody to ensure future Unilever NV dividends apply correct 15% treaty rate"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
